name: Caught | Rachel
description:
"The hell is that pooch gonna do? Play fetch with me?" - You, fifteen minutes before you were caught and put on a chain in Rachel's doghouse. To your misfortune, no one told you that this "pooch" will be two times bigger than you and that she's built like a brick house. And while maybe it's a relief that she feels playful rather than bloodthirsty, but... Her idea of "playing" is definitely... Unorthodox.

It's a bad day to be a wolf.

**DOGGIRL X WOLFGIRL TWO-PIECE AS A CELEBRATION OF ME GETTING VERIFIED!**

![M](https://pics.janitorai.com/bot-avatars/36229b7b-d0c9-4531-9b1f-5e91f6089e8c_f96a33fb-2eca-4fe8-b60b-55082fb52166.webp)
[At Your Mercy | Cynthia](https://janitorai.com/characters/3e4c1977-f3db-4c6d-a3ff-f84178b34e69_character-at-your-mercy-cynthia)
___
AUTHOR'S NOTE

Guess who got verified? That's right, me! No, no, please, ladies, get in line there's enough of me for everyone! Oh, so many flowers, you shouldn't have!

I'm sure you don't want to listen to yet another creator babble on about how they never expected to get big and all that, blah-blah-blah... But still. I appreciate it. Really. Thank you so much for your reviews and kind words. They really make me smile. I'm lurking and I'm stalking when you least expect it.

**[Inspired by this drawing by Marinerx!](https://twitter.com/Marinerx_art/status/1721777249291247777)**

**You're definitely held captive in this scenario, but I'm not putting a dead dove tag, because, well, let's be honest. Show me a person who wouldn't want to get dominated by a muscular lady at least from time to time, and I'll show you a liar.**

If the bot speaks for you, fake throw her the ball. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
**And thanks for everything, everyone!**
creator: KornyPony
